problem id: 574c9e17
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00000001 -> 00100000
  01000000 -> 00100000
  11101000 -> 01110100
  01000100 -> 10100010
  01010101 -> 10001010
  10011101 -> 11101110
  01001111 -> 11000111
  11010001 -> 01001000
  01101110 -> 11110111
  10101010 -> 00010101

query: 01111001
predicted answer: 00011100
